description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On February 5, 2026 at 1:47 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Marina del Rey, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Lincoln Boulevard at Maxella Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing southwest on Maxella Avenue in the second to the left designated left turn lane for a red light at the 
intersection with Lincoln Boulevard. After the light turned green, the Waymo AV proceeded to make a left turn onto Lincoln Boulevard. As 
the Waymo AV was completing the left turn, a passenger car that was also turning left in the adjacent leftmost designated left turn lane 
entered the Waymo AV’s lane of travel, and the front right side of the passenger car made contact with the front left side of the Waymo AV. 
At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
